raw: (PRINTABLE) Pass admits two people with a $10.00 fee per person. The ICA is always free to children 18 and under. The ICA is free to the public on Thursday nights from 5:00 - 9:00, courtesy of Target. FOR NEEDHAM RESIDENTS ONLY REDEEM THIS PASS ONLINE 1. Visit https://www.icaboston.org/ 2. Click Reserve now in the Buy Tickets box 3. For your chosen date, select ICA Museum Admission Tickets 4. Select up to two (2) at the price Library Pass Coupon. Anyone 18 and under is always free and should be reserved as Youth (0-12) or Youth (13-18) 5. Follow steps to complete your ticket purchase. Your museum admission tickets will be emailed to you. 6. When you arrive at the museum, proceed with your tickets and Library Pass to the desk for check-in. REDEEM THIS PASS IN-PERSON 1. When you arrive at the museum, proceed to the desk and show the Library Pass to complete your ticket purchase. REDEEM THIS PASS BY PHONE 1. Call 617-478-3100 during museum hours to complete your ticket purchase. Your museum admission tickets will be emailed to you. 2. When you arrive at the museum, proceed with your tickets and Library Pass to the desk for check-in. For ticketing or general inquiries, please contact our Visitor Services team at visitorservices@icaboston.org. Library Passes are not valid for performances, events, or films.

source_phrases.free_under_age: always free to children 18 and under
